title: 2026 Oscar Predictions: Best Makeup and Hairstyling
text: The 98th Academy Awards ceremony will take place on March 15, 2026, on ABC. AMPAS members will vote on Oscar winners between February 26 and March 5, including the Best Makeup and Hairstyling category. Frankenstein (Mike Hill, Jordan Samuel, Cliona Furey) is the frontrunner with a commanding 96.38% likelihood of winning, according to Gold Derby's combined predictions from experts, editors, and users. The five nominees in order of likelihood are: 1. Frankenstein – 96.38% 2. Sinners – 2.54% 3. The Ugly Stepsister – 0.54% 4. Kokuho – 0.36% 5. The Smashing Machine – 0.18%. The award was established in 1981 following complaints that makeup work in The Elephant Man deserved recognition. Hairstylists joined the category in 1993. The nominee count expanded to five in 2019, matching other craft categories.
